steps.title: Name shared wave features
steps.content: The student wants a similarity between P waves and S waves. The notes identify both as seismic waves that travel beneath Earth's surface after an earthquake begins at its focus, and both cause the ground to move in some way.

steps.title: Reject difference-focused choices
steps.content: B emphasizes a speed difference, C discusses only P waves, and D explicitly says the waves behave very differently. B, C, and D move away from the requested similarity. The best sentence highlights the shared location and shared ground movement. The answer is A.
